data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Tells What Percentage Of His Wealth Is Tied Up In Bitcoin: 'I Haven't Sold Any. Thank God, Knock On Wood!'
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, CEO of SkyBridge Capital, revealed his significant investments in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the world's largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization.

data.title: Online Mushroom Market Booms: Experts Say Be Very Careful
data.description: Websites selling psilocybin are popping up, betting on legalization. But safety and legal concerns persist as the unregulated market grows.

data.title: Trump Can't Impose Tariffs On China, Says Peter Schiff: 'He Can Only Impose Tariffs On Americans Who Buy Chinese Products'
data.description: Peter Schiff criticized Trump's tariff strategy, arguing that tariffs hurt American consumers rather than China and advocating for lower taxes and fewer regulations to boost U.S. manufacturing.

data.title: Kamala Harris Pulls A Reverse Card, Puts Trump At Fault For Border Crisis In Fox News Interview: 'Let's Just Get To The Point, Ok?'
Why Dogecoin Rival Shiba Inu Is Up 10% Over The Past Week
data.description: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is trading higher by 10% to the $0.000018-level over the trailing week.
